creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
I get it, theme parks are fun, but Florida is so much more than Mickey Mouse ears and roller coasters…

🏝️ Bean Point Beach – Anna Maria Island, FL 📍Gladiolus St. & North Shore Dr. 
Pro tip: Get there early!  It’s street parking only.  Park all the way off the street or you will get a parking ticket! 
🎨 The Ringling Museum – 5401 Bay Shore Rd, Sarasota, FL Baroque art, a circus museum, a banyan tree forest, and John and Mable Ringling’s winter palace on the bay. 
Pro tip: Go on Mondays to get in free!

🐚 Boca Grande – Gasparilla Island, FL 📍Boca Grande Causeway ($6 toll required to cross the causeway) Old Florida elegance meets turquoise water. Bring bikes or rent a golf cart to explore the island.

🏰 Henry B. Plant Museum – 401 W Kennedy Blvd, Tampa, FL Inside the former Tampa Bay Hotel, this museum is full of Gilded Age glam and Florida history.

🌺 Bok Tower Gardens – 1151 Tower Blvd, Lake Wales, FL Peaceful gardens, a singing tower, and sweeping views of central Florida. 
Pro tip: Bring your dog because it’s dog friendly! $10 per dog

🌀 The Dali Museum – 1 Dali Blvd, St. Petersburg, FL Mind-bending surrealist art in an equally surreal glass building. Bonus: incredible waterfront views.

🌊 Fort De Soto Park – 3500 Pinellas Bayway S, Tierra Verde, FL White sand, a historic fort, and kayak trails through mangroves. Also one of the best dog beaches around.

🌿 Four Mile Cove Ecological Preserve – 2500 SE 24th St, Cape Coral, FL Boardwalks through untouched nature, mangroves, and tons of wildlife. A hidden slice of quiet.

📌 Save this post if you’re planning a Florida trip and send to your travel buddy!
 ☀️ Follow @TheFloridaQueenie for more places to visit around Florida!
